info":{"abstract":"明朝洪武年间，现代人褚巩穿越到应天府南京，附身于同名小商贩。
他继承了对方的烧饼店，却因市场竞争激烈而生意惨淡。
某天，他激活了“名厨系统”，解锁了千层葱油酥饼的制作方法。
凭借这一独特美食，褚巩的生意迅速火爆，吸引了众多顾客，甚至魏国公府的徐妙云也对其念念不忘。
褚巩凭借系统优势，计划扩大经营，租下店铺，并准备推出新菜品香酥肉饼，逐渐走向小康生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2o1ca8f803a496aa26cf395b17be09ee2d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"泰史奈夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7494226982008261657","book_name":"明朝厨神：葱油饼香不活了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2698人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7494227018515481113","read_count":"2698","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1204941"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"602","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,美食,明朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/efcb38178860ce1160a19da3bb674151~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365124&x-signature=A26tmh8EI1387RRCEWnT0BoD4Gg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2722807185408590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"162"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222005247139FEA5FC0E96B592FA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat"
